subject: thinking of you -Lauren Petrella
body:
Jeffrey,
?I just want to let you know that you have been in my thoughts and I am so sorry that the news is stirring things up again. I cant?imagine?you having to go through anymore. You have always been such a incredibly ? kind and caring person . I want you to know how much I?appreciate?everything?you have done for me , you have touched my life in a million wonderful ways. You are a amazing soul. If ?ever ?there is ?anything I can do for you I am here for you.?




Lauren
body_html:
Jeffrey,
 I just want to let you know that you have been in my thoughts and I am so sorry that the news is stirring things up again. I cant imagine you having to go through anymore. You have always been such a incredibly   kind and caring person . I want you to know how much I appreciate everything you have done for me , you have touched my life in a million wonderful ways. You are a amazing soul. If  ever  there is  anything I can do for you I am here for you. 


Lauren
